sentences.target: Ich treffe dich vor der Galerie.

translations.de: Ich treffe dich vor der Galerie.
translations.en: I’ll meet you in front of the gallery.
translations.es: Nos vemos frente a la galería.
translations.fr: On se retrouve devant la galerie.
translations.yue: 我喺畫廊門口同你見面。
translations.pt: A gente se encontra em frente à galeria.
translations.vi: Mình gặp bạn trước cửa phòng trưng bày.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar voor de galerie.
translations.el: Θα σε συναντήσω μπροστά στη γκαλερί.
translations.ja: ギャラリーの前で会おう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; clausal subject.
Finite verb (present, 1st person singular); main predicate selecting an accusative object.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, accusative; direct object of 'treffe'.
Preposition indicating location; governs dative; introduces the PP 'vor der Galerie'.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; determiner for 'Galerie' as object of 'vor'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'vor' (dative), denoting location.

sentences.target: Wir gehen später in die Galerie.

translations.de: Wir gehen später in die Galerie.
translations.en: We’re going to the gallery later.
translations.es: Vamos a la galería más tarde.
translations.fr: On va à la galerie plus tard.
translations.it: Andiamo in galleria d'arte più tardi.
translations.vi: Lát nữa chúng ta sẽ tới phòng trưng bày.
translations.nl: We gaan later naar de galerie.
translations.ja: あとでギャラリーに行くよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; clausal subject.
Finite verb (present, 1st person plural); main predicate expressing motion.
Adverb of time (comparative form); modifies 'gehen'.
Two-way preposition; here indicates direction into a place and governs accusative.
Definite article, feminine, accusative singular; determiner for 'Galerie' as object of 'in' (destination).
Common noun, feminine; object of 'in', indicating the destination.

sentences.target: Die Galerie hat heute länger geöffnet.

translations.de: Die Galerie hat heute länger geöffnet.
translations.en: The gallery is open longer today.
translations.es: Hoy la galería abre hasta más tarde.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, la galerie est ouverte plus longtemps.
translations.it: Oggi la galleria è aperta più a lungo.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天画廊延长营业时间。
translations.yue: 今日畫廊延長營業時間。
translations.pt: Hoje a galeria fica aberta até mais tarde.
translations.he: היום הגלריה פתוחה עד יותר מאוחר.
translations.tr: Galeri bugün daha uzun süre açık.
translations.vi: Hôm nay phòng trưng bày mở cửa lâu hơn.
translations.nl: De galerie is vandaag langer open.
translations.hu: Ma a galéria tovább van nyitva.
translations.hi: आज गैलरी देर तक खुली है।
translations.el: Σήμερα η γκαλερί μένει ανοιχτή μέχρι πιο αργά.
translations.nb: Galleriet har åpent lenger i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini galeri buka lebih lama.
translations.sv: Galleriet har öppet längre i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi galeria este deschisă mai mult timp.
translations.da: Galleriet har åbent længere i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はギャラリーは遅くまで開いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine, nominative singular; determiner for the subject 'Galerie'.
Common noun, feminine; clausal subject.
Auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); forms a perfect-like construction with the participle 'geöffnet'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Comparative adverb; degree modifier specifying extended duration of being open.
Past participle serving as the lexical verb in the 'hat geöffnet' construction; denotes the state of being open.

sentences.target: Neben der Galerie gibt es ein Café.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ ɡaleˈʁiː ɡɪpt ɛs aɪn kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Neben der Galerie gibt es ein Café.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ ɡaleˈʁiː ɡɪpt ɛs aɪn kaˈfeː/
translations.en: There’s a café next to the gallery.
translations.es: Al lado de la galería hay un café.
translations.fr: Il y a un café à côté de la galerie.
translations.it: C’è un bar accanto alla galleria.
translations.zh-Hans: 画廊旁边有一家咖啡馆。
translations.pt: Há um café ao lado da galeria.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh phòng trưng bày có một quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Naast de galerie is er een café.
translations.hu: A galéria mellett van egy kávézó.
translations.hi: गैलरी के बगल में एक कैफ़े है।
translations.el: Δίπλα στη γκαλερί υπάρχει ένα καφέ.
translations.nb: Det ligger en kafé ved siden av galleriet.
translations.id: Di sebelah galeri ada sebuah kafe.
translations.sv: Det finns ett kafé bredvid galleriet.
translations.da: Der ligger en café ved siden af galleriet.
translations.ja: ギャラリーの隣にカフェがある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition indicating spatial adjacency; governs dative; introduces a PP.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; determiner for 'Galerie' after 'Neben'.
Common noun, feminine; object of 'Neben' in dative; location phrase.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present) used in the impersonal existential construction 'es gibt' to introduce existence.
Impersonal pronoun; dummy subject in the existential construction.
Indefinite article, neuter, accusative singular; determiner of the direct object 'Café' in 'es gibt'.
Common noun, neuter; accusative object denoting the entity that exists.
